message:
fix(bootstrap): persist genesis before removing phase lock to prevent data loss

Extract finalize_bootstrap() and reorder operations so the phase lock
file (init.lock) is only removed after genesis is persisted to disk.
Previously the lock was removed first, creating a crash window where
both the lock and genesis could be lost. Add regression test verifying
the lock survives when save_genesis fails.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
